title: NEO 4.0 Sub-session Input Packet
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P3-A (from the KEPT 4.0 Session-0 draft, Addendum A3). Live spine schema. Sub-sessions receive context ONLY through explicit, allowlisted, on-disk repo text packets, each with a content HASH and a declared SCOPE boundary. First-class isolation/custody/reproducibility/rollover element.
description: The ONLY sanctioned channel by which a master delivers context to a dispatched sub-session (and by which the audit bundle is assembled). No out-of-band prompt text, no implicit inheritance: if it isn't in an allowlisted, hashed input packet, the sub-session did not receive it. Fail-closed (A7): a packet with a missing/unknown hash, unresolved reference, or no scope declaration is BLOCKED from consumption.

packet_kind.description: start = master->builder dispatch; audit_bundle_feed = assembled cold-auditor input (D3); handoff_resume = fresh-master resume feed (D7).

allowlist.description: The EXHAUSTIVE set of on-disk, root-relative './...' text files/artifacts the receiver is permitted to read for this task. Anything outside this list is out-of-scope by construction.

content_hash.description: sha256 of the referenced file at packet-build time. Receiver re-hashes; mismatch => BLOCK (A6/A7).

role.description: Why this file is in scope (e.g. constraint_package, architecture, prior_subsession_end).

approved_paths.description: Root-relative './...' write scope. Reconciles with session_contract.approved_paths semantics (subset rule) but host-independent.

risk_tier.description: Risk class of the dispatched sub-session (drives D4 audit tier + D5 gate policy). UNKNOWN => BLOCKED (A7).

referenced_artifacts.description: Structured evidence the receiver may rely on as authority (e.g. current CONSTRAINT_PACKAGE id+hash). Distinct from allowlist (raw readable files) by being semantic dependencies.

self_hash.description: sha256 of this packet body (excluding this field). The value referenced by _provenance.source_input_packets in downstream artifacts.
